name: widemem-ai
description: AI memory layer with importance scoring, time decay, hierarchical memory (facts, summaries, themes), two-stage YMYL safety classification, and uncertainty modes. Local-first with SQLite + FAISS. 7 MCP tools.

tools.name: widemem_add
tools.description: Add text to memory with automatic fact extraction, importance scoring, and YMYL classification

tools.name: widemem_search
tools.description: Search memories by semantic similarity with confidence scoring and retrieval modes (fast, balanced, deep)

tools.name: widemem_count
tools.description: Count stored memories with optional user and agent filters

tools.name: widemem_pin
tools.description: Pin a memory with elevated importance (9.0) so it resists time decay

tools.name: widemem_export
tools.description: Export all memories as JSON for backup or migration
